description: A structured framework for mapping cellular phenotypes observed via holotomography to actionable drug-response decisions in preclinical and clinical research.

workflow.name: Data Acquisition
workflow.description: Acquire 3D holotomography (HT) and fluorescence (FL) data using Tomocube systems

workflow.name: Phenotype Identification
workflow.description: Identify and classify cellular phenotypes from refractive index (RI) and morphological features

workflow.name: Metric Quantification
workflow.description: Quantify phenotype parameters using the Core Metric Library

workflow.name: Drug-Phenotype Mapping
workflow.description: Map observed phenotype changes to known drug-response patterns

workflow.name: Decision Support
workflow.description: Generate actionable insights for drug efficacy, toxicity, and mechanism-of-action analysis
